name: cortex
description: Local, repo-scoped context platform for coding assistants. Function-level search, call graph analysis, and impact tracing for your codebase.

tools.name: context.search
tools.description: Semantic search across codebase entities (files, functions, rules, ADRs)

tools.name: context.get_related
tools.description: Get related entities via graph relationships

tools.name: context.get_rules
tools.description: Get active architectural rules and decisions

tools.name: context.find_callers
tools.description: Find what functions call this target (reverse call graph)

tools.name: context.trace_calls
tools.description: Trace what this function calls (forward call graph)

tools.name: context.impact_analysis
tools.description: Multi-hop impact analysis for code changes

tools.name: context.reload
tools.description: Reload context graph after code changes

features: Call graph analysis and dependency tracing
Local & private (no cloud, your code stays on your machine)
